chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْخَمْرَ رَأْسُ كُلِّ إِثْمٍ وَ شَرٍّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 17 – The wine is the starting point of every sin and evil

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/259)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/259)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِنَّ الْخَمْرَ رَأْسُ كُلِّ إِثْمٍ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Al Abbas Bin Aamir, from Abu Jameela, from Zayd Al Shahaam,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The wine is the starting point of every sin’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from al-‘Abbas ibn ‘Amir from abu Jamilah from Zayd al-Shahham who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Wine is the head of all sins.’”
